summary: Contract Template Feature - Backend 100% PASS (17/17 tests), Frontend UI 100% Verified. All 4 backend endpoints working: GET/PUT /api/admin/contract-template, POST/DELETE /api/admin/contract-template/logo. Frontend page at /agency-app/contract-template renders all sections correctly. Template values are correctly applied during PDF generation.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes on contract-template.tsx components may not render as HTML attributes in React Native Web - this is expected behavior, use alternative selectors for Playwright tests
Template values properly cascade to contract_data during contract generation in contracts.py lines 507-525
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract template feature fully tested. Backend pytest file created at /app/backend/tests/test_contract_template.py with 17 comprehensive tests covering all CRUD operations and edge cases. Frontend verified via Playwright - all UI sections render correctly (logo upload, agency info, 8 price fields, legal text, save button). 'Modèle' tab visible in agency-app navigation. Template values (deductible, agency_website, custom_legal_text, logo_path, default_prices) correctly applied during contract PDF generation.

backend_get_template.details: GET /api/admin/contract-template returns template data with all required fields (legal_text, deductible, agency_website, default_prices, agency_id, logo_path)

backend_get_template_default.details: Returns default template values when no custom template exists

backend_put_template.details: PUT /api/admin/contract-template updates legal_text, deductible, agency_website, default_prices fields

backend_put_template_persistence.details: Updates persist correctly - verified via subsequent GET

backend_upload_logo.details: POST /api/admin/contract-template/logo uploads logo and returns logo_path

backend_delete_logo.details: DELETE /api/admin/contract-template/logo removes logo and sets logo_path to null

backend_auth_required.details: Endpoints require authentication - return 401/403 without token

frontend_page_loads.details: /agency-app/contract-template page loads with title 'Modèle de contrat'

frontend_logo_section.details: Logo upload zone visible with 'Cliquez pour télécharger un logo' text

frontend_price_grid.details: All 8 price fields visible (Par Jour, Week-end Ven-Lun, Week-end Sam-Lun, A L'heure, Par Semaine, Par Mois 2000 Km, Par Mois 3000 Km, Km Supplémentaire)

frontend_legal_text.details: Legal text textarea visible with placeholder text showing {website} and {franchise} placeholders

frontend_navigation_tab.details: 'Modèle' tab visible in agency-app bottom navigation bar

pdf_generation_uses_template.details: Contract generation applies template values: custom_legal_text, deductible, agency_website, logo_path, default_prices
